items.title: v1.0.96
items.snippet:
What's Changed
 fix: handle fork PRs by fetching via refs/pull/N/head by @stakeswky in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/963
 New Contributors
 @stakeswky made their first contribution in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/963
Full Changelog: https://github.com

items.title: v1.0.94
items.snippet:
What's Changed
 Prepend system bin dirs to PATH when allowednonwriteusers is set by @OctavianGuzu in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1208
Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.94

items.title: v1.0.91
items.snippet:
What's Changed
 Use pinned bun binary for post-steps when allowednonwriteusers is set by @OctavianGuzu in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1190
Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/compare/v1...v1.0.91

items.title: v1.0.90
items.snippet:
What's Changed
 fix: forward MCPTIMEOUT, MCPTOOLTIMEOUT, MAXMCPOUTPUTTOKENS to action step by @qozle in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1162
 security: reject PATHTOCLAUDECODEEXECUTABLE with control characters by @qozle in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1

items.title: v1.0.89
items.snippet:
What's Changed
 fix: skip token revocation when no token was acquired by @Dave-London in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/918
 Use env vars for workflowrun context values in example workflows by @ddworken in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1125
 docs: docum

items.title: Claude Code GitHub Action v1.0
items.snippet:
🎉 Claude Code GitHub Action v1.0 - Now Generally Available!

We're excited to announce the v1.0 release of Claude Code GitHub Action! This major release brings significant improvements in simplicity, flexibility, and power to AI-assisted development workflows.
